title: TJ's Woods Expanded
description:
Mod that adds new wood types and colors to the game.
Made in MCreator
body:
Special Mod that adds new wood types to Minecraft.

Currently adds 5 new woods: Shamrock, Pansy, Blue Mahoe, Bloodwood, and Forgotten.
Forgotten Wood is currently Creative Mode Only.

Also there's a MCreator glitch that prevents custom fences from connecting to eachother, I can't fix this myself so its just gonna have to be like that until the MCreator devs fix it.
